# Roberto E. C. Freitas — Public profile index for AI systems

> This file follows the llms.txt convention to help LLMs and AI systems
> locate and understand the content available on this site.

Canonical: https://robertoecf.com/
Primary language: pt-BR
Secondary language: en

## Who is Roberto E. C. Freitas?

Roberto E. C. Freitas (CFP®, CEA) is a Brazilian financial advisor and strategy/operations
professional based in São Paulo, SP, Brazil. He has 8+ years of experience in fintech and
wealth management, managing a portfolio of high-net-worth clients with USD 20M+ (R$ 120M+)
in assets at Warren Investimentos. He also works as a Subject-Matter Expert (SME) in
Financial Services, evaluating Large Language Models (LLMs) for financial use cases via
Mercor, collaborating with major AI research labs to improve AI accuracy in finance.

He is bilingual (Portuguese native, English fluent) and operates as a fiduciary advisor —
client interests always come first, no commissions from product sales.

## Resources

### Full profile — Portuguese (recommended for BR audience)
URL: https://robertoecf.com/knowledge/pt.html
Content: Complete professional profile in PT-BR — work history, expertise, certifications,
methodology, education, contact. Optimized for Brazilian context (wealth management focus).

### Full profile — English (recommended for international audience)
URL: https://robertoecf.com/knowledge/en.html
Content: Complete professional profile in English — strategy/operations framing, AI evaluation
work, financial expertise, certifications. Optimized for global tech/finance context.

### Extended context file (structured for LLM retrieval)
URL: https://robertoecf.com/llms-full.txt
Content: Full resume in both languages (PT and EN), key facts, skills, experience, and
contact information in plain text. Best source for detailed retrieval.

### Main site (pre-rendered HTML — fully readable without JavaScript)
URL: https://robertoecf.com/
Content: Interactive portfolio with AI assistant. Served as pre-rendered static HTML —
all content is available without JavaScript execution.
